data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Streamlined user experience to reduce decision time with clear navigation options.
data.technical_spec: Menu options and playlist categories are limited and clearly defined.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Design elements like play buttons are sized and positioned for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements are strategically placed for quick access.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Maintains consistency with familiar music streaming interfaces to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: UI components similar to industry standards like play, pause, and skip icons.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design enhances perceived usability and satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Use of modern, minimalist design with high-quality imagery and animation.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related items together in the interface to create a coherent visual experience.
data.technical_spec: Playlists and album tracks are grouped visually with borders and background colors.
